headline: Is The Trade Desk, Inc. (TTD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TTD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Trade Desk, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by NathanGuoKL. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TTD. The Trade Desk, Inc.’s share was trading at $19.43 as of June 8th. TTD’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.90 and 18.94 respectively according […]
